case_title: MARILYN DIANE BARTON VS. KELLIE CRUMBLISS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARTON, MARILYN DIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUMBLISS, KELLIE $335.00 PRINCIPAL, $230.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $565.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST JUDGMENT FOR HER PREVIOUS PAYMENT TOTALING $90.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-06-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUMBLISS, KELLIE
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUMBLISS, KELLIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $523.00 FILED BY BARTON, MARILYN DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUMBLISS, KELLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED" - SIGNED BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUMBLISS, KELLIE HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON REQUEST TO PAY JUDGEMENT IN INSTALLMENT, FILED. PLAINTIFF IS WILLING TO ACCEPT MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $200.00 PER MONTH.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY KELLIE CRUMBLISS IS GRANTED, IN PART. EFFECTIVE DECEMBER 15, 2008, INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT SHALL INCREASE TO $100.00 PER MONTH. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
